title: DBT national survey of registered businesses’ exporting behaviours, attitudes and needs mid-year tables 2024
body: "The Department for Business and Trade (DBT) National Survey of Registered Businesses (NSRB) measures UK businesses’ self-reported exporting behaviours, plans, and attitudes, alongside insights into their perceptions around barriers to exporting.  This publication consists of 2 open document spreadsheet files, containing mid-year data for wave 9 of the study. The data relates to fieldwork collected between March and August 2024. One file contains data relating to business respondents with an annual turnover of £500,000 or more and the other contains data relating to all business respondents.  "
